description: Expose check-status as a reflected CLI op and report the version gap — closes FGAP-030 + FGAP-078. Add the context-check-status op (run -> checkStatus(cwd), the existing CheckStatusReport) so the drift report is reachable from the reflecting CLI, and extend the report/render to state, per behind schema, the baseline->catalog version delta — covering content-only drift (catalog-ahead is a hash comparison; a schema can be behind with no version-number change). One surface: the checkStatus report + its render + the op entry.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
notes: Closes FGAP-030 + FGAP-078 (same surface: the drift report + its exposure); advances STORY-007. Independent of the other slices.
